domain: bakery, beverage, brewery, dairy, and sanitary food-processing line hardware

ideas.idea_title: CIP Spray Ball Manifold With Tri-Clamp Branches
ideas.product_context: Sanitary cleaning loop for brewery fermenters, dairy tanks, and beverage mix vessels.
ideas.core_function: Distribute cleaning solution through multiple spray devices while maintaining hygienic flow paths and removable connections.
ideas.likely_main_part: Polished tubular manifold with angled tri-clamp outlets and integral mounting lugs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD with repeated clamp ferrules, smooth tube intersections, angled branches, polished sanitary radii, and readable orientation of many similar ports.

ideas.idea_title: Bakery Dough Chunker Infeed Guard Assembly
ideas.product_context: Bakery line hardware feeding dough masses toward a divider or chunking station.
ideas.core_function: Guide sticky dough into a cutting area while shielding operators and allowing washdown access.
ideas.likely_main_part: Sloped stainless infeed guard with removable rails, hinge points, and inspection openings.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin sheet-metal panels, sloped product-contact surfaces, hinge hardware, guard openings, and smooth transitions that must not look like solid blocks.

ideas.idea_title: Sanitary Butterfly Valve With Pneumatic Actuator
ideas.product_context: Beverage, dairy, or brewery transfer line where flow must be isolated or diverted during production and cleaning.
ideas.core_function: Open and close a hygienic process line using a compact automated valve package.
ideas.likely_main_part: Tri-clamp butterfly valve body with vertical actuator, position indicator, and clamp unions.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines circular valve geometry, clamp details, actuator cylinders, shaft alignment, handle indicators, and mixed polished and matte component surfaces.

ideas.idea_title: Dairy Sample Port With Sterile Cap Chain
ideas.product_context: Milk, yogurt, or cream processing skid requiring controlled sampling without contaminating the main line.
ideas.core_function: Provide a cleanable takeoff point for drawing small product samples from a sanitary pipe run.
ideas.likely_main_part: Short angled sample valve body with cap, chain, ferrule, and compact hand knob.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Forces accurate small-part relationships: angled nozzle, chained cap, knob grip texture, clamp interface, and clear distinction between valve body and pipe.

ideas.product_context: Brewhouse vessel hardware for introducing wort tangentially during whirlpool separation.
ideas.core_function: Direct liquid into a vessel wall with controlled tangential flow while preserving sanitary weld geometry.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved or angled vessel-wall inlet nozzle with reinforcing pad and external clamp connection.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests off-axis penetration through a curved wall, welded reinforcement, nozzle alignment, and the visual cue that flow enters tangentially rather than radially.

ideas.product_context: Beverage packaging line component that carries bottles through a rinsing or sanitizing station.
ideas.core_function: Index bottles through spray positions while keeping containers evenly spaced and supported.
ideas.likely_main_part: Replaceable starwheel plate with curved bottle pockets, hub bore, and fastener pattern.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Stresses radial repetition, scalloped pocket geometry, smooth pocket fillets, central hub features, and planar plastic-versus-metal material contrast.

ideas.idea_title: Sanitary Conveyor Drip Tray With Lift-Out Screen
ideas.product_context: Food-processing conveyor section below dairy cups, bakery pans, or beverage containers where spills need controlled drainage.
ideas.core_function: Catch washdown water or product drips and route them to a drain while allowing tool-free cleaning.
ideas.likely_main_part: Shallow sloped stainless tray with removable perforated screen, side lips, and drain ferrule.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests shallow sheet-metal forms, perforation patterns, removable nested parts, subtle slopes, lips, drain fittings, and non-ambiguous separations between tray and screen.

ideas.idea_title: Dairy Hygienic Pump Skid With Flush Base
ideas.product_context: Compact dairy or beverage transfer skid placed near fillers, pasteurizers, or ingredient tanks.
ideas.core_function: Support a sanitary centrifugal pump and piping in a cleanable layout with minimal product hold-up.
ideas.likely_main_part: Open stainless tube-frame skid carrying pump volute, motor, sanitary elbows, and leveling feet.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines frame tubing, pump volute curves, motor cylinder forms, sanitary elbows, feet, and spatial clearance between cleanable components.

ideas.product_context: Bakery finishing line applying icing, glaze, or filling across moving pastries.
ideas.core_function: Distribute viscous food product through multiple adjustable nozzles over a conveyor path.
ideas.likely_main_part: Horizontal sanitary header with indexed nozzle bodies, clamp-on brackets, and adjustment knobs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges regular nozzle repetition, small adjustment features, viscous-product geometry cues, clamp brackets, and the difference between header tube, nozzle tips, and controls.

ideas.idea_title: Brewery Dry-Hop Dosing Hopper With Sight Window
ideas.product_context: Brewery ingredient handling hardware used to introduce hops or botanicals into a closed process line.
ideas.core_function: Hold and dose loose ingredients into a sanitary transfer path while allowing operators to see fill state.
ideas.likely_main_part: Tapered stainless hopper with domed lid, sight window, clamp outlet, and latch hardware.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests tapered shell geometry, transparent insert representation, latches, sanitary outlet fittings, lid curvature, and clear differentiation between hopper volume and external hardware.
